title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Accenture India

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Software Engineer at Accenture India
jsonLd.description:
Accenture India has an exciting opening for a Software Engineer at our Visakhapatnam office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Accenture India:
Accenture India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Accenture India!
jsonLd.skills: REST APIs, TensorFlow, JavaScript, Python, Kubernetes, Microservices, CI/CD, Java
